tooltip.templenihility.nihility_bag: Right click to open: %s / %s slots used
tooltip.templenihility.nihility_vault_1: Large content-storage block: each vault adds 243 slots
tooltip.templenihility.nihility_vault_2: Adjacent vaults automatically merge into one vault network with no hardcoded cap
tooltip.templenihility.nihility_vault_3: Right click to open; empty-hand sneak-right-click toggles chunk loading
tooltip.templenihility.nihility_lantern: Right click: gain night vision and haste for cave and temple exploration
tooltip.templenihility.nihility_recovery: Right click: short regeneration, absorption, and resistance with a long cooldown
tooltip.templenihility.nihility_shadow_s: Right click: brief invisibility, speed, and slow falling to escape danger
tooltip.templenihility.nihility_purifyin: Right click: clears common negative effects and grants brief regeneration
tooltip.templenihility.nihility_echo_len: Right click: improves vision and marks nearby living beings with glow
tooltip.templenihility.nihility_barrier_: Right click: brief resistance, fire resistance, and absorption shield
tooltip.templenihility.nihility_terminal: Curios terminal: equip in common Curios slots and press O to open the bound vault network
Hold it and sneak-right-click a Nihility Vault to bind
tooltip.templenihility.nihility_amulet: Curios necklace: night vision and underwater resilience
tooltip.templenihility.nihility_belt: Curios belt: movement speed and step height
tooltip.templenihility.nihility_cloak: Curios back slot: slow falling and reduced fall damage
tooltip.templenihility.nihility_magnet: Curios charm: slowly pulls nearby dropped items toward you
tooltip.templenihility.nihility_regenera: Curios ring: slowly heals you when hurt and raises max absorption
tooltip.templenihility.nihility_miner_ch: Curios charm: improves mining efficiency and block break speed
tooltip.templenihility.nihility_ward: Curios charm: armor, knockback resistance, and periodic resistance
message.templenihility.nihility_lantern: Nihility lantern lit: night vision and haste granted
message.templenihility.nihility_recovery: Nihility recovery orb released: short protection granted

message.templenihility.nihility_echo_len: Nihility echo lens opened: nearby beings are marked
message.templenihility.nihility_barrier_: Nihility barrier core deployed: short protection active
message.templenihility.terminal_unbound: Terminal is unbound: hold it and sneak-right-click a Nihility Vault
message.templenihility.terminal_missing: You need to carry or wear a Nihility Terminal
message.templenihility.terminal_wrong_di: The bound vault is in another dimension
